title: Course: CLCO 490 - Senior Project in Cloud Computing
description: Explores cutting-edge technologies in software and hardware through advanced cloud computing projects. Topics include SaaS, IaaS, PaaS, MapReduce, Hadoop clusters, BitTorrent protocols, security issues in cloud transactions, mobile cloud applications, and multi-cloud disaster recovery. Students select projects in consultation with faculty advisors.
prerequisites_text: Department Chair permission and Senior Standing required
content:
CLCO 490 - Senior Project in Cloud Computing
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: Department Chair permission and Senior Standing required
Offered: As Needed

Description: Explores cutting-edge technologies in software and hardware through advanced cloud computing projects. Topics include SaaS, IaaS, PaaS, MapReduce, Hadoop clusters, BitTorrent protocols, security issues in cloud transactions, mobile cloud applications, and multi-cloud disaster recovery. Students select projects in consultation with faculty advisors.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Cloud Computing: Core

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=57245
